title: Amazon's Newest Kindle Paperwhite Is $35 Off Right Now
summary: It's not often I find sales on the Kindle Paperwhite, especially the latest version—but right now, Best Buy has the 2024 16GB Kindle Paperwhite on sale for $124.99 (originally $159.99) and the 32 GB Kindle Paperwhite for $144.99 (originally $199.99).
